---
title: "Download openme for Linux"
description-meta: "Download the openme CLI and server daemon for Linux — .deb packages and binaries for amd64, arm64, armhf, i386, riscv64."
keywords: [openme Linux download, openme CLI, openme deb, openme server]
toc: false
css: download.css
---

{{< include _core.qmd >}}

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  renderHero("linux", false);
  renderAllPlatforms();
});
</script>
